policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-11 - Deny FTP access'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-11 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site Slot Allowed FTP mode
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the creation of a deployment slot of an app service (such as an Web App or Function App) that has incorrectly configured the FTP mode setting. Azure FTP deployment endpoints are public. An attacker listening to traffic on a wifi network used by a remote employee or a corporate network could see login traffic in clear-text which would then grant them full control of the code base of the app or service.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - AuditIfNotExists or Disabled.
The list of allowed App Service FTP modes.
